_publications._publicationTitle: CDK4/6-MEK Inhibition in MPNSTs Causes Plasma Cell Infiltration, Sensitization to PD-L1 Blockade, and Tumor Regression.

_contextSnippet: Palbociclib reduced RB1 phosphorylation yet had no effects on ERK1/2 phosphorylation
details: Reduced RB1 phosphorylation but had no effects on ERK1/2 phosphorylation
